title: sphenomeris veitchii
intro: Sphenomeris veitchii, also known as the veitch's sphenomeris or Chinese parasol fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ginkgoaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and treating respiratory issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Sphenomeris veitchii include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
